title: Sudoku Haven
description:
Sudoku Haven is a calmer way to play Sudoku — 450,000+ hand-graded puzzles, fully unlocked and offline — no ads, no in-app purchases. It's a quiet place for your mind, too: soft light, unhurried numbers, and room to breathe between moves.



Every puzzle is hand-graded across five difficulties, from gentle Beginner grids to genuinely challenging Extreme. Play a fresh Daily Challenge every day, return to any puzzle in the archive, or generate endless random puzzles whenever you like.



Everything is built to keep you in flow:

• Smart hints that nudge you forward instead of handing you the answer

• Notes, auto-candidates, and gentle highlighting that make tough puzzles approachable

• Built-in trainers that teach real solving techniques — hidden singles, naked pairs, X-Wing, and more

• 20 hand-tuned themes, light and dark — make the board truly yours

• Stats, streaks, and stars that quietly track your progress

• A relaxing brain workout with keyboard and controller support, soothing music, and soft sound



No clutter, no pressure — just you and the next square.



Fully unlocked: no ads, no in-app purchases — just the complete game, playable offline.



A friendly head-to-head multiplayer mode is in mind, too — and the more players who find the Haven, the sooner it arrives.



Find your calm and start solving.
description_short: Daily brain & logic puzzles. Find your calm in 450,000+ Sudoku puzzles — free and offline. A fresh daily challenge, real solving trainers, and 20 quiet themes. Unwind and start solving.
